name: python3-sqlite-fts4
title: python3-sqlite-fts4
summary: Document scoring Python library for SQLite FTS4
description:
Document scoring Python library for SQLite FTS4
Custom SQLite functions written in Python for ranking documents indexed
using the SQLite FTS4 extension.
.
Includes functions for ranking with TF-IDF and the Okapi BM25 scoring
algorithm.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sqlite-fts4 because Document scoring Python library for SQLite FTS4.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sqlite-fts4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sqlite-fts4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sqlite-fts4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
